gachaLine:
"I'd like to share with you the
view after climbing upward."

0: I will never forget... that breathtaking view when I reached the summit for the first time.
Where did these rope marks come from...? Hmm...
Your touch... feels as good as being tied up.
1: Mmm... If it gets tighter, I... Mmm...
Nngh... Don't use your hands... use... use the rope...!
3: Mmh...! If it's you... I'd willingly be your sub...
Hah... mmh! Rather than being toyed with from behind... I'd prefer... to be tied up by you...!
Shame that the ropes cannot reach there. If there's something similar...
100: When climbing, I sometimes come across pretty raw crystals... Next time, I'd want one polished and given to you.
Just being tied up like this... doesn't seem that bad, either...

story.1: Khafka is a somewhat solitary figure in the otherwise lively and bustling Section Hunk. Known for his reserved nature, he often feels out of place in such an environment. As passionate rock climber, he tends to prefer solitude during his climbs, largely due to some "unique" reactions he experiences while climbing, which makes it difficult for him to climb with others.
story.2: Most of the time, the only companions Khafka has are the rock walls, sunlight, and winds, along with the climbing rope that binds him. Over time, this solitary lifestyle has made it more difficult for him to socialize. However, this situation began to change dramatically when he started going to the Hard & Firm Gym.
story.3: Khafka's muscular, thick build soon made him the center of attention among the gym members. With his sharp gaze, intense focus during training, and quiet nature, Khafka quickly became known for his unique personality. Thanks to him, more and more gym members started trying out rock climbing themselves, which, to Khafka's dismay, meant that he would have to look for new, secluded climbing spots.
story.4: Though the environment has become noisier than before, Khafka doesn't mind it as much as he originally thought. If given the opportunity, he would like to share the private thrill, excitement, and beauty he experienced during rock climbing with someone who understands—someone who truly "gets" it. Khafka believes that someday, at Hard & Firm Gym, he will meet someone who will share that special connection with him.

1.text: In comparison to doing it gently, Khafka definitely likes it rougher.

2.text: This... Are you trying something new?
Only you can... think of these sorts of things...ugh!
Seems like I can try new things from time to time.

3.text: N-no... Sorry, I didn't mean that....
No problem, your wish is my command!

1.text: Khafka's expressionless face looks super mean!

2.text: Can... can you put me down already?
Wait! I still have secret tricks I haven't shown you, don't leave just yet.

3.text: This is different than what I have in mind...
Khafka shows... sort of a fleeting look of loneliness.
